roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,1/X:AGT RAMY YASSINE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STATE PAROLE/TN:GARY LEE DODGE/X:PAROLEE WAIVES PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:PAROLEE ADMITS ALLEGED VIOLATIONS1, 2/X:CASE SUBMITTED/X:COURT FINDS PAROLEE IN VIOLATION OF PAROLE, PAROLE IS REVOKED,/X:AS TO VIOLATION # 1 - ABSCONDING PAROLE SUPERVISION/X:ASTO VIOLATION # 2 - TRAVELING BEYOND 50 MILES FROM RESIDENCE WITHOUT DAPO APPROVAL/X:PAROLEE SHALL BE REMANDED TO THE CUSTODY OF THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION AND JURISDICTION OF THE BOARD OF PAROLE HEARINGS FOR THE PURPOSE OF FUTURE PAROLE CONSIDERATION/
/CAL: PRE HEARING CONFERENCE ON PAROLE AND TO SET PROBABLE CAUSE HRG/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/X: GOLDEN GATE FOR SENIORS PROGRAM WAS DENIED TO THE DEFENDANT/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/NB/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PRE HEARING  CONFERENCE AND TO SET/
